examples: The past has a visage, superstition, and a mask, hypocrisy.
It was the visage of a demon who has just found his damned soul.
Close your eyes and try to recreate his or her visage in your mind.
Aunt Jemima's visage (see story, p. 100) is one that has changed with the times.
If staring at the incoming callers' visage just wasn't enough, Current's Caller ID might worth a try.
